title: EVL Toys
description: Adds in a brand new toy, Mr Scoot! Very heavy WIP but uploading for ModFest: Toybox
body:
Welcome to EVL Toys, my latest mod made for the ModFest: Toybox jam! The mod is a very heavy WIP still, however it gives a fun way to drive around the world!

The main feature of the mod for this contest is Mr Scoot, a brand new Vehicle that you can drive in. Right now everything is not survival friendly, however you can eventually use Resin to make your new best friend
